request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are quietly shifting defense budgets away from collective security? While we're keeping our commitments, some partners are prioritizing domestic spending over shared burdens. This isn't about trust—it's about ensuring our deterrence remains credible. When allies underinvest, our preparedness gap grows. Let's push for transparent burden-sharing or reconsider our exposure. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
